meaning: n.帕夏(旧时奥斯曼帝国和北非高级文武官的称号,置于姓名后),高级文(武)官
examples: Pasha, together with her best friend Adrianna, got the idea of building a home for the homeless.
General Pasha may have to quit.
The baby's father is Pasha, a very beefy and bull-headed man.
The work of Pasha 183, who died in April 2013, included photorealistic murals and socially critical installations.
Franklin Graham and Muslim leader Imam Izak-el Mu'eed Pasha of New York's historic Malcolm Shabazz mosque.
